_calibration_note: Recalibrate these distributions after each major portfolio review. Band keys must match the output of scoreToBand() in bet-sizing.js: '44+', '39-43', '30-38', '<30'. outcomes are MOIC multiples; probs must sum to 1.0. These defaults are illustrative — replace them with your actual portfolio data.
calibration_source: Describe what data these are calibrated from (e.g. '30 deals reviewed, 5 mature exits')

44+.calibration_note: Highest-conviction deals. Replace with your own data once you have 5+ mature positions in this band.

39-43.calibration_note: Strong-conviction deals. Placeholder — calibrate from your own exits.

30-38.calibration_note: Worth-exploring band. If this band historically underperforms, consider retiring it as an invest signal.

<30.calibration_note: Below-threshold deals. Well-calibrated in practice — confirms pass discipline.
